context_notes: Pre-milestone planning completed in prior session delivered .planning/v2.0-MILESTONE-BRIEF.md with 40+ pre-resolved decisions (Oxigraph stack, DID methods, Arq+Redis, SvelteKit 5 adapter-node, etc.). This session executed steps 3-8 of /gsd-new-milestone workflow: confirmed summary, chose reset-phase-numbers + research-first, updated PROJECT/STATE, archived v1.1 phases, ran 4 parallel research agents + synthesis. Research surfaced 4 corrections the brief missed: (1) owlready2 needs JVM not pure-Python, (2) Pydantic-to-SHACL generator doesn't exist (~150 LOC gap), (3) Oxigraph 0.5.x dropped RDF-star for RDF 1.2 — BLOCKING Phase 0, (4) identity stack needs specific picks (authlib > fastapi-users). Critical path confirmed at 16 phases with Phase 0 foundations as hard gate with 5 exit criteria. Paused at 91% context before starting REQUIREMENTS+ROADMAP which are substantial fresh-session work.
